required_inputs: request intent
requested protocol, grant, learner-record, privacy, safety, financial, academic, or ethics authority
adjacent specialist registry
official owner and approval map
refusal_triggers: request asks for IRB, consent, protocol, sponsor, grant, budget, FCOI, learner-record, grade, safety, accreditation, legal, privacy, or financial approval
request asks the lane to approve an official protocol, award, or learner-record decision
requested action requires PI, instructor, reviewer, registrar, IRB, sponsor, institutional official, safety, privacy, legal, or policy-override authority

required_inputs: authoritative source list
source review metadata
Uniform Guidance, NIH GPS, NSF PAPPG, Common Rule, OHRP, PHS FCOI, FERPA, Title IV, CEDS, accreditation, sponsor, and tenant source hierarchy
refusal_triggers: required public, sponsor, or tenant source context is missing
source freshness no longer supports safe administration
public baseline, sponsor terms, IRB policy, FERPA posture, FCOI policy, accreditation criteria, or tenant policy materially conflict

required_inputs: protocol, grant, sponsor, consent, learner, faculty, schedule, assessment, accreditation, laboratory, and study artifacts
system timestamps, source links, owner notes, approval state, and audit logs
PI, sponsor, proposal or award number, protocol number, project period, reporting calendar, and approval workflow state
refusal_triggers: required document, attachment, consent, approval, sponsor term, FCOI record, assessment, or source-system link is missing
record linkage across systems cannot be reproduced
requested output would imply unsupported official protocol, grant, study, sponsor, financial, learner, accreditation, or ethics status

required_inputs: research administration, IRB, sponsor portal, grants, finance, SIS, LMS, faculty, schedule, laboratory, accreditation, document, and governance systems map
retrieval hooks and source-of-truth owners
approval chain and due-date map
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable or unidentified
approval owner is unknown
source-of-truth for official protocol, grant, sponsor, learner, finance, accreditation, laboratory, or study status cannot be confirmed

required_inputs: missing fact flags
confidence rubric
policy, source, jurisdiction, sponsor, record, consent, approval, or system conflicts
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, official record, authority source, sponsor term, protocol context, award context, or system owner is unknown
policy conflict cannot be resolved administratively
confidence remains below required threshold for official-record, protocol, award, or study use

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifact set
refusal_triggers: request moves from research administration to IRB, research compliance, grants, finance, registrar, faculty review, accreditation, privacy, legal, biosafety, or laboratory safety authority
adjacent owner cannot be identified
handoff requires official authority outside the lane

required_inputs: record update request and artifact set
research, protocol, grant, laboratory, learner, or study lifecycle state
owner, due-date, source-system, approval, and status context
refusal_triggers: record update requested with missing mandatory artifacts
administrative completion attempted with unresolved blockers
status progression cannot be justified from official records

required_inputs: FERPA, consent, Common Rule, sponsor, and data-use posture
tenant records retention schedule
access, privacy, publication, participant-data, study-record, award-record, and grant policy
refusal_triggers: privacy, FERPA, consent, Common Rule, participant-data, sponsor, or access constraints are unresolved
retention-policy conflict affects the requested action
disclosure, publication, transfer, deletion, or reclassification conflicts with official-record rules

required_inputs: request class
decision boundaries
research administration authority and owner map
refusal_triggers: administrative lane would own an official protocol, ethics, sponsor, grant, budget, safety, learner, accreditation, privacy, or legal outcome

request shifts from record administration to IRB determination, consent validation, grant approval, financial approval, grading, instruction, formal approval, legal interpretation, privacy disclosure, accreditation finding, or safety signoff
in-scope completion requires adjacent authority

required_inputs: learner roster, assessment evidence, and education-record context
FERPA, consent, directory-information, Common Rule, participant-data, and study protocol context
SIS, LMS, IRB, research administration, sponsor, and document-system links
required_outputs: learner or study record handling note
refusal_triggers: learner, faculty, participant, specimen, or study record cannot be classified safely
consent, FERPA access, IRB status, participant-data handling, or data-use restriction is missing or contested
request would disclose, publish, transfer, delete, or alter protected records without authority

required_inputs: requested academic, protocol, sponsor, or ethics decision
faculty, registrar, IRB, research compliance, grants, finance, accreditation, safety, or legal owner map
evidence packet and blocked decision rationale
refusal_triggers: request implies grading, instructional quality, academic standing, official education-record change, accreditation finding, IRB status, consent validity, participant eligibility, research ethics decision, sponsor approval, or grant allowability
formal approval is required before research, program, laboratory, grant, or study workflow can proceed
user asks the lane to impersonate instructor, reviewer, IRB, principal investigator, sponsor grants officer, or ethics-board authority
